phaseName: v0.3.0 release-readiness review / curated PR boundary
phaseGoal: Decide whether the accumulated v0.3.0 work is locally release-ready and safe to move into a curated commit / PR boundary without publishing or tagging.
deliverable: A checked release-readiness decision with fresh verification evidence, an updated v0.3.0 checklist, and a clear next step for curated PR packaging.
inScope: Review v0.3.0 release docs, README, CHANGELOG, usage guide, and release checklist for misleading stable-vs-RC claims
Run the v0.3.0 release-readiness verification matrix
Confirm committed truth and runtime artifacts remain separated
Record whether the dirty v0.3.0 worktree is ready for curated commit / PR boundary review
outOfScope: Native desktop app, hosted backend, embeddings, or RAG
Large UI redesign or new product scope
stopCondition: Stop after release-readiness is backed by fresh local evidence and written into .threadsmith truth; do not publish/tag without explicit user approval.
